No Poverty.reason: The course content, focusing on case teaching methodology and business administration, provides no direct or indirect evidence related to poverty eradication or economic resources for the poor.

Zero Hunger.reason: There is no evidence in the course description or objectives that relates to food security, nutrition, sustainable agriculture, or food production systems.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course syllabus contains no information pertaining to health services, disease prevention, mental health, or well-being initiatives.

Quality Education.reason: The course is explicitly about 'Teaching by Case Method: Theory and Practice,' aiming to improve teaching methodology and develop research capabilities for academia, directly aligning with quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and increasing qualified teachers (Target 4.c).
